[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101011110 6
1 011000110 4
2 011111001 6
3 011111101 7
4 100000010 2
5 001110110 5
6 000101001 3
7 000000010 1

01 10 010111111 7
12 21 111111110 8
23 32 111011110 7
34 43 011111111 8
45 54 011111101 7 match 3
56 65 111111111 a
67 76 101110110 6
70 07 001111111 7

02 20 101111111 8
13 31 011110110 6
24 42 111111111 a
35 53 011111111 8
46 64 111111011 8
57 75 011111111 8
60 06 100101011 5
71 17 011110110 6

03 30 011101111 7
14 41 011111111 8
25 52 111111111 a
36 63 111000110 5
47 74 011111111 8
50 05 011111101 7 match 3
61 16 110110110 6
72 27 101111110 7

04 40 011111001 6 match 2
15 51 011111111 8
26 62 101011110 6 match 0
37 73 011110110 6
